In the 2019 rugby league season, [[Widnes Vikings]] competed in the [[2019 RFL Championship|RFL Championship]], the [[2019 Challenge Cup|Challenge Cup]] and the [[2019 RFL 1895 Cup|1895 Cup]]. It was the first season since their relegation from the [[Super League]] at the end of 2018.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.rugby-league.com/article/34927/season-review-widnes-vikings |title=Season Review: Widnes Vikings |publisher=RFL |date=29 October 2018 |access-date=20 January 2024}}</ref> Widnes began the season on -12 points after going into [[Administration (law)|administration]], but following a takeover and the appointment of a new board of directors the club were able to maintain their Championship status and reach the final of the 1895 Cup.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.rugby-league.com/article/23136/widnes-vikings-%7C-a-year-on-from-takeover |title=Widnes Vikings {{!}} A year on from takeover |publisher=RFL |date=28 February 2020 |access-date=20 January 2024}}</ref>
